message:
🐛 Fix OAuth status retry after restart

checkOAuthConfigured() only ran on mount. If the backend was still
starting after an auto-update restart, it cached oauthConfigured=false
and never retried. Now retries every OAUTH_RETRY_MS (5s) until the
backend responds, ensuring the OAuth status is accurate after restart.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
